name: 02_asia_london_range_breakout_xauusd_m5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, an Asia-session range (00:00-06:00 UTC) whose size is 0.5-2.0x ATR, when broken with a wide-body candle in the first 9 bars of London (07:00-10:00 UTC), produces directional continuation with PF>=2.0 and controlled drawdown.

entry_rules.long: in London window AND bars_since_london_open <= 9 AND close > asia_high + 0.5*ATR AND candle_body >= 1.2*ATR AND first_breakout_of_day
entry_rules.short: in London window AND bars_since_london_open <= 9 AND close < asia_low - 0.5*ATR AND candle_body >= 1.2*ATR AND first_breakout_of_day

exit_rules.stop_loss: opposite side of asia range or 1.5*ATR, whichever is tighter
